query: heavy 35mm film grain noise texture analog photography
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: heavy 35mm grain, noise textures, gritty analog

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of a brown and white textured surface with an irregular, mottled pattern resembling natural stone, granite, or a composite material. The surface features small granular flecks distributed across a warm tan base with scattered white patches, filling the entire frame without any discernible edges or distinct objects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up photograph of a brown and white textured surface with an irregular, mottled pattern where fine detail remains elusive. The granular surface dissolves into smeared, indistinct patches across the warm tan and white coloration, leaving the actual material identity ambiguous as small structures and true texture fail to resolve into clear form.
